🤯 Remember when Africa unequivocally ruled Europe's biggest individual prize?

George Weah wasn't just good. He was the ONLY African player to ever win the Ballon d'Or, doing it in 1995! Pure, unadulterated dominance for PSG & AC Milan. A true pioneer who changed perceptions forever.

#FootballHistory #AfricanLegends #BallondOr
